window_summary: This window tracks the recent release evolution of ChatGPTNextWeb/NextChat, covering a series of minor and major updates from v2.9.8 through v2.16.1. The releases introduce new model support (Gemini, Claude, Ollama, GPT-4o, o1, DeepSeek, etc.), UI improvements, security fixes, plugin systems, and features like artifacts, realtime API, and MCP support.
